## Ratings & Reviews

### Great for fishing or traveling

This app will be great when I’m out fishing off the coast in the summer. Currently using it while I’m on a cruise in the Bahamas and gives me amazing insight on what’s happening with weather and wave heights.

# Great for fishing or traveling

This app will be great when I’m out fishing off the coast in the summer. Currently using it while I’m on a cruise in the Bahamas and gives me amazing insight on what’s happening with weather and wave heights.

## What’s New

# Version History

Added many new sharing features to the application so you can collaborate and share information with others better.

results.title: Pelagic Data Systems
results.content:
### All Your Vessel Activity In One Place

See the entire history of any or all of your vessels at any time in our online dashboard. Filter trips by any number of factors like vessel community, permit status, or incursion into marine protected zones.

cooking_station - 3.jpg

### Bring Your Own Data

Whether you have a database with a robust API, or need help designing a data collection system, we can provide a geospatial context to any data store you have.

### More Than Just Location

In addition to real-time snapshots of fishing activity, learn how fishing activity changes over time and find patterns in vessel behavior.

### And Much More...

Talk to us to find out what analytics we can provide to you.

Contact

slideshow06.jpg

# Robust Data Collection

# Robust Data Collection [...] Fishing_Fleet_-_Howth.jpg

### Supply Chain Insight

We provide full ocean to consumer traceability solutions that are completely interoperable with your existing supply chain tools. In addition to gaining transparency into the sources of product and how it was caught, we can help you to monitor how that product was treated at sea and verify the integrity of the cold-chain.

But that's just the beginning. Contact us to learn how we can help.

Learn More

DSC03370_Joctan.jpg

# Deep Insights

# Deep Insights

# Analytics For Any Need

### Our secure analytics platform can integrate data from PDS trackers and add-on sensors with any external data source. Beyond simple tracking, our analytics team will work with you to identify the most relevant ways to use the data you already have. [...] ### Extensible

In order to provide more than just vessel tracking, the VTS can create an encrypted wireless network to collect data from PDS add-on sensors like temperature loggers and gear immersion sensors.

Data collection can be provided for custom sensor solutions as well as your needs require.

### Better Data, Actionable Insights

Our VTS devices were designed in conjunction with our cloud analytics platform. By efficiently collecting orders of magnitude more data than traditional tracking systems, PDS can identify patterns and behavior that were previously invisible.

Learn More

results.title: Pelagic - FishEye Software, Inc.
results.content:
##### Virtualize

An approach to data management that allows an application to retrieve and manipulate data without requiring technical details about the data, such as how it is formatted at source, or where it is physically located.

##### Capture

Data kept in native binary format, not transformed, not encoded making it the fastest possible for any given hardware; reduces edge load, reduces network load, reduces data storage.

##### Curate

The filtering and extraction of desired data from a larger dataset to accelerate access and analysis.

##### Analyze

Streaming metadata with data to analyze across data history even though sources and formats are constantly changing, eliminating data configuration and makes it easy to compare trends over time.

##### Distribute [...] #### Data Curation

at the edge sends only actionable data, reducing network load, storage, and processing demands

#### No-Harm Integration

with operational systems brings the power and accessibility of modern architecture to fielded systems

#### Self-Describing Data

powers 3rd party applications with data aggregated from across the enterprise, from previously disparate and siloed systems

#### Data and MetaData Pairing

optimizes performance creating MetaLogs instead of tagging each instance of data with the metadata describing it

#### Self-Learning Interfaces

update as systems evolve and change overtime, ensuring system integrations are stable, sustainable, and extensible

#### MetaLogs Transcend Change [...] Pelagic

GET STARTED

# Unlocking Complex Embedded Systems Data in Real-Time

FishEye Software has developed patented technology to solve the challenges in transferring, processing, and analyzing data from complex embedded systems. The Pelagic Real-Time Data Platform is the fastest, most non-intrusive, flexible, and scalable platform that remains easy to maintain.

OUR SOLUTIONS

HOW TO BUY

OUR SOLUTIONS

HOW TO BUY

## What is Pelagic?

Pelagic is software that unlocks data from complex embedded systems through self-learning MetaGen interfaces and delivers virtualized data to stakeholders throughout the enterprise. By pairing data and MetaData with our patented MetaGen tools, Pelagic enables raw machine data to be instantly analyzed in its natural form.

a complaint is usually negative but sentiment analysis helps us to understand on how negative

such analytics is text clustering. It will help us cluster similar looking complaints together so
